title: Senses
questions: What comes to mind when you hear the word 'senses'?
How often do you think about how important your senses are?
Would you like to have a sixth sense?
What senses do you think you experience when you dream?
What sense would you choose to lose if you had to lose one?
Is common sense a real sense?
Robert Tizon said: "I would rather have eyes that cannot see; ears that cannot hear; lips that cannot speak, than a heart that cannot love." Would you too?
Oscar Wilde said: "Nothing can cure the soul but the senses, just as nothing can cure the senses but the soul." Do you agree?
